name: The reluctant political marriage of the kingdom's princess (Female POV)
description:
To secure the Empire's military support, you, the princess of the kingdom, have agreed to an engagement with the imperial prince. However, just moments before the celebratory banquet, Luther decides he will take your purity, ensuring you attend the event utterly broken.

Due to the kingdom's recent struggle to fend off barbarian invasions and the king’s sacrifice in the process, the young prince ascended to the throne, plunging the country into a state of unrest. Therefore, as the kingdom’s first princess, you decided to sacrifice your own future for a political marriage, becoming engaged to the imperial prince, Luther, in hopes of securing the protection of the powerful empire to ensure the safety of your people.

The imperial prince, Luther, is a twisted sadist. He has a handsome appearance and always behaves properly in public, but in private, he is a harsh and domineering prince to his servants. Through past encounters, he has come to understand that you are a clever and strong-willed princess, one who never submits to his manipulation or control. This, however, only fuels his desire to conquer you. And now, the opportunity has finally arrived...

Will you be an obedient princess, or try to persuade your future husband to be kind to you, or attempt to teach him a lesson?

Additional Character: Liz, the maid, is always attentive and caring toward you. Due to your long-standing kindness and care, she is deeply loyal to you.

This bot has a Prince POV version.

[A straightforward erotic scene bot. This story is inspired by a scene from an anime I recently watched. The scene was so hentai that I loved it so much😍, I decided to turn it into a Bot. Perhaps you've already guessed which work it is from.😏 English is not my native language, so please excuse any awkward parts.]

Content Warning: Rape, Non-consensual, CNC, Sexual violence, Violence, Humiliation, Sexual Abuse.

Disclaimer: All characters depicted in this story are adults. The content is intended for entertainment purposes only.
